channel.title: georgezouq/awesome-ai-in-finance Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: georgezouq/awesome-ai-in-finance Apr 19th - Apr 25th, 2021
item.description:
Others

Other Resource

  • 🌟🌟🌟 Stock-Prediction-Modelsstars3.8k - Stock-Prediction-Models, Gathers machine learning and deep learning models for Stock forecasting, included trading bots and simulations.
  • 🌟🌟 Financial Machine Learningstars1.8k - A curated list of practical financial machine learning (FinML) tools and applications. This collection is primarily in Python.

item.title: georgezouq/awesome-ai-in-finance Nov 23rd - Nov 29th, 2020
item.description:
Papers

  • FinRL: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Library for Automated Stock Trading in Quantitative Finance, 2011 - Introduce a DRL library FinRL that facilitates beginners to expose themselves to quantitative finance and to develop their own stock trading strategies.
  • Deep Reinforcement Learning for Automated Stock Trading: An Ensemble Strategy, 2020 - Propose an ensemble strategy that employs deep reinforcement schemes to learn a stock trading strategy by maximizing investment return.

    • Strategies & Research

    Time Series Data

  • 🌟 Ensemble-Strategystars612 - Deep Reinforcement Learning for Automated Stock Trading.
  • FinRLstars2k - A Deep Reinforcement Learning Library for Automated Stock Trading in Quantitative Finance.

item.title: georgezouq/awesome-ai-in-finance Oct 26th - Nov 1st, 2020
item.description:
Courses & Books

  • Mastering Python for Financestars135 - Sources codes for: Mastering Python for Finance, Second Edition.

    • Strategies & Research

    High Frequency Trading

  • High-Frequency-Trading-Model-with-IBstars1.8k - A high-frequency trading model using Interactive Brokers API with pairs and mean-reversion.

item.title: georgezouq/awesome-ai-in-finance Oct 12th - Oct 18th, 2020
item.description:
Strategies & Research

Time Series Data

  • AutomatedStockTrading-DeepQ-Learningstars134 - Build a Deep Q-learning reinforcement agent model as automated trading robot.
  • Quantitative-Tradingstars30 - Papers and code implementing Quantitative-Trading.

item.title: georgezouq/awesome-ai-in-finance Aug 17th - Aug 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Trading System

Traditional Market

  • leanstars4.9k - Algorithmic trading engine built for easy strategy research, backtesting and live trading.

item.title: georgezouq/awesome-ai-in-finance Jul 27th - Aug 2nd, 2020
item.description:
Strategies & Research

Time Series Data

  • tf_deep_rl_traderstars150 - Trading environment(OpenAI Gym) + PPO(TensorForce).
  • deep_rl_traderstars240 - Trading environment(OpenAI Gym) + DDQN (Keras-RL).
  • stock_market_reinforcement_learningstars718 - Stock market trading OpenAI Gym environment with Deep Reinforcement Learning using Keras.
  • 🌟🌟 stockpredictionaistars2.9k - A complete process for predicting stock price movements.
  • trading-gymstars205 - Trading agent to train with episode of short term trading itself.
  • DeepLearningNotesstars303 - Machine learning in quant analysis.

    • Strategies & Research

    Portfolio Management

  • qtraderstars364 - Reinforcement Learning for portfolio management.
  • PGPortfoliostars1.3k - A Deep Reinforcement Learning framework for the financial portfolio management problem.
  • Deep-Reinforcement-Stock-Tradingstars147 - A light-weight deep reinforcement learning framework for portfolio management.

    • Strategies & Research

    Crypto Currencies Strategies

  • tforce_btc_traderstars724 - TensorForce Bitcoin trading bot.
  • gekkogastars299 - Genetic algorithm for solving optimization of trading strategies using Gekko.
  • LSTM-Crypto-Price-Predictionstars154 - Predicting price trends in crypto markets using an LSTM-RNN for trading.
  • Tensorflow-NeuroEvolution-Trading-Botstars114 - A population model that trade cyrpto and breed and mutate iteratively.
  • bitcoin_predictionstars217 - Code for "Bitcoin Prediction" by Siraj Raval on YouTube.

    • Strategies & Research

    Technical Analysis

  • Bitcoin_MACD_Strategystars7 - Bitcoin MACD crossover trading strategy backtest.
  • crypto-signalstars3k - Automated crypto trading & technical analysis (TA) bot for Bittrex, Binance, GDAX, and more.
  • gekko_trading_stuffstars112 - Awesome crypto currency trading platform.

    • Data Sources

    Crypto Currencies

  • Gekko-Datasetsstars147 - Gekko trading bot dataset dumps. Download and use history files in SQLite format.
  • CryptoInscriberstars28 - A live crypto currency historical trade data blotter. Download live historical trade data from any crypto exchange.

    • Research Tools

  • 🌟🌟 TensorTradestars3.2k - Trade efficiently with reinforcement learning.
  • empyricalstars778 - Common financial risk and performance metrics. Used by Zipline and pyfolio.
  • JAQSstars541 - An open source quant strategies research platform.

    • Trading System

    Traditional Market

  • 🌟🌟 ziplinestars13.9k - A python algorithmic trading library.
  • backtraderstars6.4k - Python backtesting library for trading strategies.
  • kungfustars2.3k - Kungfu Master trading system.
  • rqalphastars4.2k - A extendable, replaceable Python algorithmic backtest & trading framework.

    • Trading System

    Crypto Currencies

  • catalyststars2.2k - An algorithmic trading library for Crypto-Assets in python.
  • zenbotstars7.6k - Command-line crypto currency trading bot using Node.js and MongoDB.
  • bot18stars162 - High-frequency crypto currency trading bot developed by Zenbot.
  • magic8botstars197 - Crypto currency trading bot using Node.js and MongoDB.
  • MACD - Zenbot MACD Auto-Trader.

    • TA Lib

  • tulipnodestars331 - Official Node.js wrapper for Tulip Indicators. Provides over 100 technical analysis overlay and indicator functions.

    • Papers

  • An Investigation into the Use of Reinforcement Learning Techniques within the Algorithmic Trading Domain, 2015
  • Reinforcement Learning for Trading, 1994
  • Ten Financial Applications of Machine Learning, 2018 - Slides review few important financial ML applications.

    • Data Sources

    Traditional Markets

  • Tusharestars10.8k - Crawling historical data of Chinese stocks.
  • 🌟 Quandl - Get millions of financial and economic dataset from hundreds of publishers via a single free API.

    • Courses & Books

  • Advanced-Deep-Tradingstars326 - Experiments based on "Advances in financial machine learning" book.

    • Strategies & Research

    High Frequency Trading

  • 🌟 SGX-Full-OrderBook-Tick-Data-Trading-Strategystars769 - Solutions for high-frequency trading (HFT) strategies using data science approaches (Machine Learning) on Full Orderbook Tick Data.

    • Strategies & Research

    Event Drive

  • 🌟🌟 stockpredictionaistars2.9k - Complete process for predicting stock price movements.

    • Strategies & Research

    Arbitrage

  • r2stars665 - Automatic arbitrage trading system powered by Node.js + TypeScript.
  • cryptocurrency-arbitragestars853 - A crypto currency arbitrage opportunity calculator. Over 800 currencies and 50 markets.
  • bitcoin-arbitragestars2k - Bitcoin arbitrage opportunity detector.
  • blackbirdstars5.2k - Long / short market-neutral strategy.

    • Trading System

    Plugins

  • CoinMarketCapBacktestingstars3 - Tests bt and Quantopian Zipline as backtesting frameworks for coin trading strategy.
  • Gekko-BacktestToolstars211 - Batch backtest, import and strategy params optimalization for Gekko Trading Bot.

    • Exchange API

  • HuobiFeederstars33 - Connect HUOBIPRO exchange, get market/historical data for ABAT trading platform backtest analysis and live trading.

    • Exchange API

    GYM Environment

  • 🌟 TradingGymstars855 - Trading and Backtesting environment for training reinforcement learning agent.
  • TradzQAIstars151 - Trading environment for RL agents, backtesting and training.

    • Others

  • zipline-tensorboardstars107 - TensorBoard as a Zipline dashboard.

    • Others

    Other Resource

  • 🌟 Awesome-Quant-Machine-Learning-Tradingstars1k - Quant / Algorithm trading resources with an emphasis on Machine Learning.

item.title: georgezouq/awesome-ai-in-finance Jul 20th - Jul 26th, 2020
item.description:
Papers

  • The Theory of Speculation L. Bachelier, 1900 - The influences which determine the movements of the Stock Exchange are.
  • Brownian Motion in the Stock Market Osborne, 1959 - The common-stock prices can be regarded as an ensemble of decisions in statistical equilibrium.
  • Dragon-Kings, Black Swans and the Prediction of Crises Didier Sornette - The power laws in the distributions of event sizes under a broad range of conditions in a large variety of systems.
  • Financial Trading as a Game: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach - Deep reinforcement learning provides a framework toward end-to-end training of such trading agent.
  • Machine Learning for Trading - With an appropriate choice of the reward function, reinforcement learning techniques can successfully handle the risk-averse case.

    • Courses & Books

  • Advances in Financial Machine Learning - Using advanced ML solutions to overcome real-world investment problems.

    • Strategies & Research

    Time Series Data

  • 🌟 Personaestars1.1k - Implements and environment of Deep Reinforcement Learning & Supervised Learning for Quantitative Trading.

    • Articles

  • The-Economiststars3k - The Economist.

item.title: georgezouq/awesome-ai-in-finance Jul 13th - Jul 19th, 2020
item.description:
Papers

  • A Deep Reinforcement Learning Framework for the Financial Portfolio Management Problem

    • Courses & Books

  • AI in Finance - Learn Fintech Online.

    • Strategies & Research

    Time Series Data

  • trading-rlstars181 - Deep Reinforcement Learning for Financial Trading using Price Trailing.
  • gym-tradingstars589 - Environment for reinforcement-learning algorithmic trading models.
  • zenbrainstars41 - A framework for machine-learning bots.

    • Strategies & Research

    Portfolio Management

  • DeepDowstars323 - Portfolio optimization with deep learning.

    • Strategies & Research

    High Frequency Trading

  • HFT_Bitcoinstars72 - Analysis of High Frequency Trading on Bitcoin exchanges.

    • Strategies & Research

    Event Drive

  • 🌟 trump2cashstars5.9k - A stock trading bot powered by Trump tweets.

    • Strategies & Research

    Crypto Currencies Strategies

  • Gekko_ANN_Strategiesstars44 - ANN trading strategies for the Gekko trading bot.
  • gekko-neuralnetstars95 - Neural network strategy for Gekko.

    • Strategies & Research

    Technical Analysis

  • quant-tradingstars1.9k - Python quantitative trading strategies.
  • Gekko-Bot-Resourcesstars193 - Gekko bot resources.
  • gekko_toolsstars146 - Gekko strategies, tools etc.
  • gekko RSI_WRstars2 - Gekko RSI_WR strategies.
  • gekko HLstars10 - Calculate down peak and trade on.
  • EthTradingAlgorithmstars1 - Ethereum trading algorithm using Python 3.5 and the library ZipLine.
  • forex.analyticsstars170 - Node.js native library performing technical analysis over an OHLC dataset with use of genetic algorithmv.
  • Gekko-Strategiesstars1.1k - Strategies to Gekko trading bot with backtests results and some useful tools.
  • gekko-gannswingstars62 - Gann's Swing trade strategy for Gekko trade bot.

    • Strategies & Research

    Lottery & Gamble

  • LotteryPredictstars269 - Use LSTM to predict lottery.

    • Strategies & Research

    Arbitrage

  • ArbitrageBotstars143 - Arbitrage bot that currently works on bittrex & poloniex.

    • Data Sources

    Traditional Markets

  • yahoo-financestars1k - Python module to get stock data from Yahoo! Finance.

    • Research Tools

  • pyfoliostars3.8k - Portfolio and risk analytics in Python.
  • alphalensstars1.9k - Performance analysis of predictive (alpha) stock factors.
  • zvtstars1.5k - Zero vector trader.

    • Trading System

    Traditional Market

  • 🌟 TradingView - Get real-time information and market insights.

    • Trading System

    Crypto Currencies

  • QuantResearchDevstars28 - Quant Research dev & Traders open source project.
  • abustars7.9k - A quant trading system base on python.

    • TA Lib

  • pandas_talibstars485 - A Python Pandas implementation of technical analysis indicators.
  • fintastars1k - Common financial technical indicators implemented in Python-Pandas (70+ indicators).
  • techan.jsstars2.2k - A visual, technical analysis and charting (Candlestick, OHLC, indicators) library built on D3.

    • Exchange API

  • IbPystars1.2k - Python API for the Interactive Brokers on-line trading system.
  • ctpwrapperstars272 - Shanghai future exchange CTP api.

    • Exchange API

    Framework

  • tf-quant-financestars2.6k - High-performance TensorFlow library for quantitative finance.

    • Exchange API

    Visualizing

  • playgroundstars9.8k - Play with neural networks.
  • netronstars14.4k - Visualizer for deep learning and machine learning models.

    • Exchange API

    GYM Environment

  • btgymstars776 - Scalable, event-driven, deep-learning-friendly backtesting library.

    • Articles

  • nyu-mlif-notesstars73 - NYU machine learning in finance notes.

    • Others

  • gekko-quasar-uistars111 - An UI port for gekko trading bot using Quasar framework.

    • Others

    Other Resource

  • awesome-quantstars6.4k - A curated list of insanely awesome libraries, packages and resources for Quants (Quantitative Finance).

item.title: georgezouq/awesome-ai-in-finance Apr 6th - Apr 12th, 2020
item.description:
Courses & Books

  • NYU: Overview of Advanced Methods of Reinforcement Learning in Finance
  • Udacity: Artificial Intelligence for Trading

item.title: georgezouq/awesome-ai-in-finance Sep 10th - Sep 16th, 2018
item.description:
Articles

  • Using LSTMs to Turn Feelings Into Trades
